vocab.meaning: phần cốt lõi/nền tảng của chương trình học
vocab.example: Statistical analysis is the cornerstone of the curriculum in my data science major.
First-year students are required to acquire foundational knowledge in macroeconomics before moving to advanced modules.

vocab.meaning: sự tò mò/ham học hỏi về trí tuệ
vocab.example: I chose to major in Philosophy because it satisfies my intellectual curiosity about the nature of existence.

vocab.meaning: tiêu chuẩn học thuật khắt khe
vocab.example: The law faculty is renowned for its rigorous academic standards and competitive atmosphere.
Sustainability plays a pivotal role in my architecture studies, as we focus on green building designs.
After graduation, I hope to continue contributing to the realm of academia through a PhD program.

vocab.meaning: sự hiểu biết/kiến thức liên ngành
vocab.example: My course in International Relations provides cross-disciplinary insights into history, politics, and economics.

vocab.meaning: các tạp chí chuyên ngành được bình duyệt (thẩm định bởi chuyên gia)
vocab.example: As part of my major, I spend a significant amount of time critiquing articles in prestigious peer-reviewed journals.
While the theory is fascinating, I am more interested in the practical application of psychology in the workplace.

vocab.meaning: mở rộng tầm hiểu biết/kiến thức
vocab.example: Studying English Literature has really helped to broaden my horizons and appreciate different cultural perspectives.
